I’m a quite petite woman and I actually really appreciate Lulu Lemon making smaller sizing. I typically wear a lulu size 0 and on their size charts they actually say that their sizes run quite a bit smaller so that all the super tiny girls out there can also find clothing that fits. 90% of the time I can’t go into stores and just buy clothing because my waist size is a 000 but I still have the curves of a woman so I can’t just “buy kids clothing”.
